name: Federated Learning Pipeline
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Federated learning orchestration — experiment tracking, model registry, FL SDK

dev.note: Free tier, 1 compute instance, local FL simulation

prod.note: Managed FL orchestrator, 5 silos, secure aggregation

enterprise.note: Multi-region, 20+ silos, differential privacy, audit logging

services.name: Confidential Computing
services.purpose: Trusted execution environments — secure aggregation and model training in enclaves

dev.note: Single SGX node for enclave testing

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Model artifacts, training checkpoints, aggregated model snapshots

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Silo worker nodes — local model training and gradient computation

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Encryption keys, attestation certificates, silo authentication secrets

enterprise.note: Dedicated HSM, CMK for all data

services.name: Virtual Network
services.purpose: Private connectivity between silos — VPN gateways, private endpoints

enterprise.note: Global reach, dedicated circuits per silo

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Training metrics, convergence tracking, silo health dashboards

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized audit logs — silo participation, model updates, privacy budget tracking

optimization_tips: Use FL simulation mode in dev to avoid spinning up real silo workers — saves 80% on compute
Schedule training rounds during off-peak hours — spot pricing reduces confidential compute costs by 40%
Use differential privacy with tight epsilon budgets to reduce the number of required training rounds
Start with 3-5 silos in production — add silos incrementally as data partnerships mature
Use model compression (quantization, pruning) to reduce checkpoint storage costs by 60%
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
